sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6861" key="a)nakwmw|de/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακωμῳδέω</orth>, <sense id="n6861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to bring on the stage, satirize,</tr_> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
